name: Analytics page renders its dashboard for a logged-in user
description: A logged-in user opens /app/analytics and sees the Analytics heading and stat cards with numeric values. Time-series charts may not be present on a new account; a 'Not enough data yet' message is acceptable alongside the stat cards.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Open the Analytics page by navigating to the /app/analytics route. If a tour or onboarding popup appears, dismiss it.

Verify the page shows the heading text 'Analytics' and is NOT a 404 or blank page. Then verify that a row of stat cards is visible, each showing a numeric value with a label such as XP, reviews, cards, or streak. Charts or heatmaps may or may not be present depending on account history — a 'Not enough data yet' message is acceptable. The page must not be blank, unstyled, or broken.
